name: Rum Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/2 oz Yellow cake mix (no pudding added)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-cup bundt pan.
3. Sprinkle chopped pecans in the bottom of the pan.
4. Pour batter made from water, cake mix, pudding, eggs, oil, and rum evenly over the pecans.
5. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cool completely and invert the cake onto a serving plate.
Glaze:
1. Melt butter and sugar together in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir continuously to prevent burning, wiping down the sides of the pan as needed.
3. Once melted, add the remaining rum and stir until combined.
4. Using an ice pick or small knife, make several holes in the top of the cooled cake.
5. Drizzle the glaze evenly over the cake, allowing it to soak in between layers.
6. Let the cake sit for at least 15 minutes before serving.
7. Serve with espresso or another after-dinner liqueur. Enjoy!
8. This recipe keeps well and is even better the next day. It also freezes well.
